other_observers: Found by Glenn Walbek, Steve Larson, Lisa Edwards MOB
specific_location: Below the dam at Two Buttes Res.
description: Smaller Vireo with grayish back and wings. No wing bars. Crown was a darker gray, white supercillium and dark eye line extending through the lores. Throat was yellow. Breast was yellow, darker in the center, pale toward the wing shoulders. Belly and under tail coverts also yellow.Behavior: Bird was observed gleening insects from new emerging leave budsCall: none heardPlumage: basic
